name: Brainshark Sales Enablement API
what_it_does: Sales readiness and enablement platform with REST API — providing on-demand video training content, AI-powered sales coaching assessments (video role-play scoring), sales content library management, learning paths for onboarding, and readiness tracking to ensure sales teams are prepared to sell effectively.
use_cases: Querying sales rep readiness scores and training completion data for manager dashboards
Automating training assignment based on role changes or new product launches via API
Pulling content engagement analytics to identify most effective sales materials
Integrating Brainshark readiness data with Salesforce for rep-level performance context
Managing sales content library programmatically for consistency across regions
not_for: Customer-facing content delivery and demo tools (use Highspot or Seismic for customer-facing)
General corporate LMS for non-sales training (use Docebo or Cornerstone)
Live sales call coaching (use Gong or Chorus for live conversation intelligence)
best_when: A sales enablement team needs to build sales rep readiness through video training, AI-scored role-play assessments, and content library management, with manager visibility into team preparation levels.
avoid_when: You need customer-facing content delivery, general LMS, live call coaching, or light-weight onboarding without AI assessment features.

auth.notes: API key from Brainshark account. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped access. Webhook for training completion and assessment events. Salesforce integration via native connector. No OAuth2. Acquired by Bigtincan 2021.

pricing.notes: Boston-based company. Founded 1999. Acquired by Bigtincan (2021). Pioneer in sales readiness. AI-powered video coaching assessment (Coaching Excellence AI) — scores rep video submissions for confidence, vocabulary, tempo. Scalable training delivery. Strong in pharmaceutical, financial services, and enterprise sales. Post-acquisition integrated into Bigtincan Hub platform.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for training content, assignments, completions, and readiness scores. Bearer token auth. Limited public documentation. Bigtincan acquisition affects roadmap. AI coaching assessment is async — video submissions scored within hours. Content library management includes rich media types.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Training completion reads fully idempotent. Readiness score reads idempotent. Content reads idempotent. Assignment reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Bigtincan acquisition (2021) — API roadmap may shift toward Bigtincan Hub
AI coaching assessment is async — video scoring takes hours, not seconds
Video content upload requires multipart uploads — not simple JSON API
Salesforce integration for activity sync configured in admin
Annual contract — verify integration requirements before commitment

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 and GDPR compliant. US and EU data residency. Bearer token auth. Video coaching submissions contain rep performance data — sensitive HR context. Training completion data is employee PII — restrict access. Bigtincan acquisition brings Australian public company security posture.
